evals.prompt: Create a Sanctuary-style dashboard page for a meditation app. It should show today's meditation stats (total minutes, sessions completed, current streak), a weekly progress chart, and a recommended meditation session card with an image.
evals.expected_output: A React component with Sanctuary styling: serif italic headings, large rounded cards (2-3rem), decorative glow blobs, motion animations, glass morphism effects, and the blue primary color palette.
expectations: Uses font-serif italic for main headings
Cards have rounded-[2rem] or larger border radius
Includes decorative blur glow elements on cards
Uses motion/react for animations
Primary color #0059b6 is used for accents
Has proper responsive breakpoints (sm:, lg:)
Uses lucide-react icons
Stat numbers are large and use serif italic font

evals.prompt: Build a user profile page in Sanctuary style for a fitness app. Show the user's avatar, name, membership badge, stats (workouts completed, total hours, calories burned), and a list of recent achievements with icons.
evals.expected_output: A profile component with centered avatar, animated stats cards, achievement list with hover effects, all using Sanctuary design tokens.
expectations: Avatar is displayed with rounded corners and shadow
Stats are shown in a grid layout with large serif italic numbers
Achievement list items have hover slide animation (whileHover: x: 10)
Uses inverse-surface dark card for contrast section
Labels use uppercase tracking-widest pattern
Includes motion.div with page entrance animation
Uses bg-white/60 backdrop-blur-xl glass effect on list container

evals.prompt: Design a settings page in Sanctuary style with sections for notifications, privacy, appearance themes, and account management. Each section should have an icon, title, and toggle/dropdown controls.
evals.expected_output: A settings page with grouped sections, each in a rounded card with icons, using Sanctuary typography and color system.
expectations: Settings grouped in rounded containers with large radius
Each setting has an icon from lucide-react in a colored rounded box
Section titles use uppercase tracking-widest labels
Cards use border border-white subtle edge
Toggle/switch controls are styled consistently
Page has motion entrance animation
Uses surface-container-lowest for card backgrounds
